{{Quote|Darth Vader knows we're here now... so Threepio, Artoo, and I had better scout up another hiding-place for the rebels-- fast!|Luke Skywalker|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 8">[[Star Wars (1977) 8|''Star Wars'' (1977) 8]]</ref>}}
This '''scout ship''' was a craft used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] for reconnaissance missions.

==History==
[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] piloted it to search for a new Rebel base once the secret location on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] had been compromised. Luke thought he found a candidate world in the [[Drexel system/Legends|Drexel system]], but his hopes were dashed when his ship was forced down to the planet by [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Quarg]]'s jamming equipment.

The ship splashed onto the water covered surface of [[Drexel/Legends|Drexel]] and the craft eventually sunk beneath the surface.

==Behind the scenes==
Though this ship bears a resemblance to the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]], its size is apparently significantly smaller. The exact class and type remains a mystery, though it also bears a resemblance to the [[XS-800 light freighter/Legends|XS-800 light freighter]].
